coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:48 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 90% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 12:00 at 90%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/3. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/3. 12:00 at 90%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 12:00 at 90%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 34% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 90% for 12:00. Then 21min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 12:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2/3. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 2/3. 90% FTP × 12:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 63% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 63% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 36 minutes of work done. 16 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 63% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 90% for 12:00. Then 4min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 90% × 12:00. Then 4min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 12:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 90% for 12:00. Then 4min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 90% × 12:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 53 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 36min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
